claims.summary: A connected socket and meaningful live telemetry must be distinguishable.
claims.disposition: verify connection perception states separate awaiting, first-valid, and current-telemetry conditions

claims.summary: Stalled arrivals should become explicit stale-hearing evidence while the socket remains open.
claims.disposition: verify inter-arrival classes, cadence clarity, and field-versus-hearing warnings cover the stale stream case

claims.summary: Reconnect frequency may correlate with perceived pressure without proving network causation.
claims.disposition: route a bounded time-aligned pressure-risk versus reconnect-count observation with temporal-association labeling
